[[File:GegWinthazen.jpg|230px|thumb|Major Geg Winthazen in the city of Narmle]]
{{Quote|Oh, such bad news that the transport was destroyed. But the Empire must go on. Here, please take this ballistics report to Captain Thrawn.|Geg Winthazen|<ref name="SWG:DIT" />}}
'''Geg Winthazen''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Major/Legends|major]] and [[Non-commissioned officer/Legends|non-com]] posted to the [[Emperor's Retreat/Legends|Emperor's Retreat]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was later based out of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Narmle (city)|Narmle]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] once sent a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to deliver some [[Hologram disc/Legends|holodisks]] taken from the black box of a downed [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] to Winthazen.<ref name="SWG:DIT" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Geg Winthazen was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:CT">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=static|Captain Thrawn|Naboo}}</ref> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>

Geg Winthazen was originally part of the initial version of the Imperial themepark in which Thrawn sent players to locate Winthazen near the Emperor's Retreat on Naboo.<ref name="SWG:CT" /> However, in the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Imperial Theme Park|Imperial Theme Park]], released with the "[[W:c:swg:Update Notes 6.12: September 13 2007|Chapter 6.12]]" update, on [[September 13]], [[2007]],<ref name="SonyCite-Chapter 6.12: Masters of the Wild">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67417&month=092007|text=Chapter 6.12: Masters of the Wild}}</ref> Winthazen was placed in Narmle on Rori. Despite these changes, the overall story of delivering him holodisks from a downed vessel remained the same.<ref name="SWG:DIT" />
